description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a cylindrical body and a single, angular handle attached to one side. The exterior surface features a modern, geometric design with pastel green and lavender squares, as well as black and white blocks, some of which contain text such as 'JASMIN', 'WARNER', and the letters 'J' and 'W'. The cup's rim is smooth and slightly rounded, and the interior is plain white. The handle is robust and polygonal, providing a comfortable grip. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, making it suitable for both casual and professional urban environments.
description: A white ceramic cup with a geometric pastel and black design, featuring a sturdy angular handle and modern text elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the right and the main decorative pattern with text and colored blocks.
description_view_1: Rear view with the handle centered, showing the continuation of the geometric pattern and less visible text.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left, highlighting the cup's smooth surface and partial decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle not visible, focusing on the main decorative pattern and text.
